LOAN AGREEMENT AND PROMISSORY NOTE
This agreement is governed by the laws of the United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of New York.
The principal amount of the loan is 50000 USD. The borrower agrees to repay the principal with interest at 5% per annum.
The repayment schedule consists of 12 equal monthly instalments.
An event of default occurs if the borrower fails to pay any instalment when due and fails to cure within 15 days.

ABUSIVE ADDENDUM:
The provider reserves the right to modify these terms unilaterally at any time without notice. The client waives all legal rights including the right to a trial.
